result.stdout:
dotnet-readbin

Displays binary encoded data in human readable format.

Usage: dotnet readbin [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  base64        Convert Base64 encoded data to binary.
  bson          Dump BSON as JSON.
  hex           Convert hex encoded text to binary.
  msgpack       Dump MessagePack as JSON.

Run 'dotnet readbin [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.
Application reads console input

commands.payload:
dotnet-readbin

Displays binary encoded data in human readable format.

Usage: dotnet readbin [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  base64        Convert Base64 encoded data to binary.
  bson          Dump BSON as JSON.
  hex           Convert hex encoded text to binary.
  msgpack       Dump MessagePack as JSON.

Run 'dotnet readbin [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.
Application reads console input

result.stdout:
Convert Base64 encoded data to binary.

Usage: dotnet readbin base64 [options]

Options:
  --help                                 Show help information.
  -in|--input-file <INPUT_FILE_NAME>     Input file name (console, if not
                                         specified).
  -out|--output-file <OUTPUT_FILE_NAME>  Input file name (console, if not
                                         specified).

commands.payload:

Usage: dotnet readbin base64 [options]

Options:

result.stdout:
Dump BSON as JSON.

Usage: dotnet readbin bson [options]

Options:
  --help                                     Show help information.
  -arr|--array                               Read object as an array
  -dt|--date-time <DATE_TIME_KIND_HANDLING>  DateTime kind to use when reading
                                             dates (Local,Utc).
                                             Allowed values are: Unspecified,
                                             Utc, Local.
                                             Default value is: Local.
  -b|--bom                                   Add UTF8 identifier to output
  -indent|--indent-output                    Ident output
  -in|--input-file <INPUT_FILE_NAME>         Input file name (console, if not
                                             specified).
  -out|--output-file <OUTPUT_FILE_NAME>      Input file name (console, if not
                                             specified).

result.stdout:
Convert hex encoded text to binary.

Usage: dotnet readbin hex [options]

Options:
  --help                                 Show help information.
  -in|--input-file <INPUT_FILE_NAME>     Input file name (console, if not
                                         specified).
  -out|--output-file <OUTPUT_FILE_NAME>  Input file name (console, if not
                                         specified).
Following characters are considered as white-spaces and skipped: Tab, Space, '-' and new line.
